permits.description: Saw cut existing slab on grade around perimeter of foundation interior. Install 44 helical piles. 2 concrete footings with 2 steel columns. sister existing 2X8 floor joists with new 2X8 joists where required. Demo existing front steps pressure treated wood. New 10" concrete  grade beam minimum 4' deep . Rebuild front steps with pressure treated lumber .

llm_assessment.reasoning: The $150,900 permit is for major structural and foundation repairs by a very long-term (26+ years) owner-occupant, which suggests essential maintenance rather than a pre-sale renovation.
